sentence_reviews.text: A spiking neural network communicates with discrete events and evolving membrane states, supporting temporally precise and potentially energy-efficient computation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Discrete spikes and temporal dynamics are standard, but the packet source is not a dedicated SNN/neuromorphic source and energy-efficiency is conditional.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Spiking neural networks is to connect Spiking neurons & temporal coding, Recurrence & feedback state to downstream capabilities including Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment, Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning neural-network background; AIMA agent/sensor/control context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Spiking/temporal and neuromorphic relevance is plausible, but packet sources do not directly support the full downstream deployment claims.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
sentence_reviews.notes: Neuromorphic deployment is plausible for SNNs, but direct support from packet sources is weak.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning neural-network background; AIMA sensor/agent context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Plausible but not directly evidenced by the cited packet sources.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Spiking neurons & temporal coding, Recurrence & feedback state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning and AIMA general neural-network/dynamics background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are plausible; broad limitation wording is generic and not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.text: Spiking neural networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Spiking neurons & temporal coding.
sentence_reviews.notes: The dependency is definitional, but the packet source is not specific enough for a strict verified verdict.

sentence_reviews.text: Spiking neural networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Recurrence & feedback state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning recurrent and neural dynamics background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Many SNNs are recurrent/dynamical, but recurrence is not necessary for all spiking networks.

sentence_reviews.text: Spiking neural networks rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Dynamical systems & control theory.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA dynamical/control context; Deep Learning neural dynamics background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Membrane-state dynamics make dynamical-systems framing defensible; control theory is broader than directly required.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/core is definitional for SNNs, though packet evidence is general.
composes/core is too strong for all SNNs because feedforward spiking networks exist; recurrence is common but not universal.
requires/common is defensible for membrane-state temporal dynamics but not directly sourced as control theory.
